channel.title: epensak on Alexander Lab @ WHOI
channel.description: Recent content in epensak on Alexander Lab @ WHOI

item.description: Emily Pensak is an undergraduate student at Cape Cod Community College pursuing an Associates degree in Biology and expected to graduate spring of 2026. She plans to transfer to a four-year college to continue studying Biology. Emily is a Blue Economy guest student in the Alexander lab, working on culturing experiments and nutrient limitation.
